introSection: Huracanito is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Belantis in Leipzig, Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Huracanito has a small oval-shaped track layout with red track and yellow supports. It is a Gerstlauer Kiddy Racer model.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride has one car which seats a single rider.

fullText:
Huracanito is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Belantis in Leipzig, Saxony, Germany.

Huracanito has a small oval-shaped track layout with red track and yellow supports. It is a Gerstlauer Kiddy Racer model.

The ride has one car which seats a single rider.
